document.title: Life Cycle Report for ADD Abyz Digital Detector

sourceSummary.oneLine: Life Cycle Report for the HAD1417MCW ADD Abyz Digital Detector.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports product life-cycle documentation by recording component basis, usage assumptions, and estimated service life.
keyPoints: The document states it is the life cycle of the HAD1417MCW of ADD.
The Power Supply Box model is DEPS9601 from Daean Elecom Co. Ltd.
Estimated life is based on KMG Series capacitor information from Samyoung Electronics and a capacitor life calculation.
The estimated service life is stated as about 5 years.

concepts.name: Capacitor estimated life calculation
concepts.evidence: Capacitor estimated life calculation L = L0 x 2^((Tmax - Ta)/10)

concepts.name: Reasonably foreseeable worst usage
concepts.evidence: Reasonably foreseeable worst usage: Using for 24 hours a day with a battery charger plugged in

evidence.claim: The document is the life cycle of the HAD1417MCW of ADD.
evidence.evidenceText: This document is life cycle of the HAD1417MCW of ADD.

evidence.claim: The Power Supply Box model name is DEPS9601.
evidence.evidenceText: Part key - Power Supply Box Model Name ... DEPS9601

evidence.claim: The Power Supply Box vendor is Daean Elecom Co. Ltd.
The life basis uses estimated life of KMG Series capacitor from Samyoung Electronics.
evidence.evidenceText: Basis - Estimated life of KMG Series capacitor from Samyoung Electronics.

evidence.claim: The capacitor estimated life calculation uses L = L0 x 2^((Tmax - Ta)/10).
evidence.evidenceText: Capacitor estimated life calculation L = L0 x 2^((Tmax - Ta)/10)

evidence.claim: The calculation assumes L0 is 1,000 hours, Tmax is 105℃, and Ta is 50℃.
evidence.evidenceText: L0: Life at rated temperature (hour) = 1,000 Hours Tmax : Rated Temperature (℃) = 105℃ Ta : Ambient Temperature (℃) = 50℃

evidence.claim: The calculated result is supposed to be 45,254.8 hours.
Average daily use is less than 9 hours per day.
evidence.evidenceText: Average daily use : Less than 9 hours per day

evidence.claim: Reasonably foreseeable worst usage is using for 24 hours a day with a battery charger plugged in.
evidence.evidenceText: Reasonably foreseeable worst usage: Using for 24 hours a day with a battery charger plugged in

evidence.claim: The estimated service life is about 5 years.
